name: Acurate smgg
description: A Bandit SMG built with a Hyperion barrel, giving it steadier recoil and more reliable accuracy than most Bandit guns. In exchange, it usually gives up some damage and magazine size, but with the right parts it can stay effective at longer range than most other Bandit weapons.
notes: It may roll with the deliberately misspelled Akurate prefix, can appear at green rarity or higher, and is most commonly found as a standard world drop.
